field_option_map_t(3) Library Functions Manual field_option_map_t(3)

NAME

field_option_map_t - Field name to registry option name mapping.

SYNOPSIS

Data Fields


const char * field
C struct field name (e.g., color_mode"). const char * option
Registry option name (e.g., color-mode").

Detailed Description

Field name to registry option name mapping.

Maps C struct field names (underscores) to registry option names (hyphens). Some names don't map by simple substitution:

  • discovery_port → discovery-service-port
  • palette_type → palette
  • reconnect_attempts → reconnect

Definition at line 560 of file rcu.c.

Field Documentation

const char* field_option_map_t::field

C struct field name (e.g., "color_mode").

Definition at line 561 of file rcu.c.

const char* field_option_map_t::option

Registry option name (e.g., "color-mode").

Definition at line 562 of file rcu.c.
